dialog.restart.title: Restart Required
dialog.restart.body: Language has been saved. Restart Sakuya Translator to apply it.
proof.status.noModel: No usable API model. Fill Base URL, API key, and model name in API settings first.
proof.status.modelIncomplete: The selected proofreading model is incomplete.
proof.status.noItems: No completed translations are ready for AI proofreading.
proof.status.applyDone: Applied the AI suggestion. Run rule check again to confirm formatting.
proof.status.aiFailureAdvice: Check API settings/quota, or lower concurrency and try again.
proof.ready.select: Select a translation file before proofreading.
proof.ready.ok: This file is fully translated and ready to proofread. Rule check is local; AI proofread uses the model below.
proof.ready.okWithWarnings: This file is fully translated and ready to proofread, but {0} formatting warnings still need review. Rule check is local; AI proofread uses the model below.
proof.ready.wait: Finish translation before proofreading. Current progress: {0}/{1}, hard errors {2}.
proof.model.none: No proofreading model is available. AI proofread needs Base URL, API key, and model name in API settings.
proof.model.current: Current AI proofreading model source: {0}. Rule check does not use this model.
api.localModel.watermark: GGUF path for a future local backend
manual.sourceWatermark: Type text or load from queue
live.waiting: The newest text will appear here when translation starts
live.noSource: No source text yet. Start translation or select a queue entry.
live.noTranslation: No translation yet. Completed text will appear here live.
speed.desc.conservative: Conservative: 1 file, 1 API request, 10 items per batch, 500ms request gap. Safest for low quota or rate-limited APIs.
speed.desc.normal: Normal: 1 file, 3 API requests, 20 items per batch, 250ms request gap. Recommended balance of speed and stability.
speed.desc.fast: Fast: 2 files, 5 API requests, 30 items per batch, 120ms request gap. Much faster, but needs a stable API quota.
speed.desc.batch: Batch: 3 files, 8 API requests, 50 items per batch, 60ms request gap. Fastest preset; lower the advanced values if the API rate-limits.
speed.desc.custom: Custom: edit the advanced speed parameters below. Increase requests and items/batch for speed; lower them and increase gap when rate-limited.
settings.speed.advancedHint: Choose Custom to edit these numbers. Normal, Fast, and other presets apply fixed values and lock the fields.
settings.experimental.proofreadHint: Shows the Proofread entry in JSON details. Rule and AI proofreading are still experimental and may produce false positives, so use them as review aids only.
provider.openai.name: OpenAI
provider.openai.subtitle: Official OpenAI API for GPT models. Use the link below to manage API keys.
provider.gemini.name: Gemini
provider.gemini.subtitle: Google Gemini OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Use an API key from Google AI Studio.
provider.deepseek.name: DeepSeek
provider.deepseek.subtitle: Official DeepSeek OpenAI-compatible endpoint for /chat/completions.
provider.mimo.name: Xiaomi MiMo
provider.mimo.subtitle: Official Xiaomi MiMo OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Use an API key from the Xiaomi MiMo API platform.
provider.openrouter.name: OpenRouter
provider.openrouter.subtitle: OpenRouter aggregates many model providers behind one OpenAI-compatible API key.
provider.kimi.name: Kimi
provider.kimi.subtitle: Official Kimi / Moonshot OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
provider.qwen.name: Qwen
provider.qwen.subtitle: Alibaba Cloud Model Studio DashScope OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
provider.glm.name: Zhipu GLM
provider.glm.subtitle: Zhipu AI OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
provider.siliconflow.name: SiliconFlow
provider.siliconflow.subtitle: SiliconFlow OpenAI-compatible endpoint for open and commercial models.
provider.local.name: Local GGUF
provider.local.subtitle: Reserved for a future llama.cpp / LLamaSharp local backend. Base URL is not required.
provider.custom.name: Custom
provider.custom.subtitle: Custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Fill in Base URL, model name, and API key manually.
api.status.configPath: Configuration is saved in the app Data/api_profiles.json file.
api.status.newProfile: Added an API profile. Fill it in and save, then the proofreading page can use this model.
api.status.newModel: Added an empty model slot. Enter a model name and save to add it to the dropdown.
api.status.deletedProfile: Deleted the current API profile. Save to apply it.
api.status.providerChanged: Switched to {0}. API key, model name, and local model path were cleared to avoid mixing providers.
api.status.fillConnection: Fill connection settings for the selected provider.
api.status.localFound: Local model file exists. A local backend can be connected later.
api.status.localMissing: Local model file was not found. Check the GGUF path.
api.status.missingFields: Fill in Base URL, API Key, and model name.
api.status.ready: Configuration looks ready. Save it and the queue will use this model.
api.status.testSuccess: Connection test succeeded and the model is reachable.
api.status.testTimeout: Connection test timed out. Check network or endpoint latency.
